subcodes.first_line: O gracious Lord! Shield the righteous from every affliction... O my God, my God! We are servants who have sought shelter at Thy exalted threshold and taken refuge beneath Thy most great bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند بزرگوار ابرار را از هر آفتی محفوظ... إلهی إلهی نحن عبيد لذنا بعتبتک العليا و التجأنا بموهبتک العظمی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
